name: Cloud Storage bucket access logging not enabled
description: Access logging is not configured for the bucket. Without access logs, there is no record of who accessed or modified objects, making incident investigation and compliance auditing impossible.
remediation: Enable access logging by setting a log bucket: gcloud storage buckets update gs://BUCKET --log-bucket=LOG_BUCKET --log-object-prefix=PREFIX. Ensure the log bucket is in the same region. Configure a lifecycle rule on the log bucket to control retention.
